user.title: 🚀 Violet Pool Setup Wizard
user.description:
Choose whether you want to start the configuration wizard immediately or open the detailed documentation first.

📘 **Documentation**
• [Configuration Guide]({docs_en})

🛟 Support & Feedback: {issues_url}

data_description.action: Open documentation or start setup directly.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Safety and Liability
disclaimer.description:
⚠️ **Safety Warning**

This integration provides remote control for pumps, heaters, lights and dosing systems. Incorrect configuration may cause equipment damage, personal injury or chemical overdosing. Make sure you understand all safety features and keep manual overrides accessible. Please review the [Configuration Guide]({docs_en}) before you continue.

📘 **Learn more**
• [Configuration Guide]({docs_en})

data.agreement: ✅ I accept all risks and have read the full disclaimer.

help.title: 📘 Help & Documentation
help.description:
• Read the [Configuration Guide]({docs_en}) for step-by-step instructions, safety notes, and feature explanations.
• Need assistance or want to share feedback? Open an issue at {issues_url}.

🔗 Project Repository: {github_url}

Click **Next** to return to the main menu.

connection.title: 🌐 Controller Connection
connection.description:
Connect your Violet Pool Controller to Home Assistant. Ensure the controller is on the same network and the API is reachable.

📘 Additional docs: [Configuration Guide]({docs_en})

data_description.username: Optional username if authentication is enabled
data_description.device_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant
data_description.device_id: Unique ID if multiple controllers exist

pool_setup.title: 🏊 Pool Configuration
pool_setup.description: Provide pool size, type, and disinfection method. These values are used for runtime optimization, energy management, and dosing calculations.

feature_selection.title: ⚙️ Enable Smart Features
feature_selection.description: Enable only the features your pool installation actually uses. This keeps resource usage low and the UI tidy. You can adjust this selection later in the options.

data_description.enable_filter_control: Control the filter pump on demand

sensor_selection.title: 📊 Select Sensors
sensor_selection.description:
Choose which sensors you want to see in Home Assistant. Enable or disable individual sensors to keep your dashboard clean and focused.

💡 **Tip:** By default, all available sensors are selected. You can adjust this selection at any time in the options.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Controller
reauth_confirm.description:
The controller credentials need to be updated. Please enter your new username and password.

Controller: **{controller_name}**
IP Address: **{api_url}**

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Connection
reconfigure.description:
Update connection settings for your controller. Useful if the IP address or network settings have changed.

Controller: **{controller_name}**

data_description.host: New controller IP or DNS name

error.invalid_ip_address:
Invalid IP Address

Please enter a valid IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.x)
error.cannot_connect:
🔌 **Connection Failed**

Controller unreachable. Check:
• Is the IP address correct?
• Is the controller powered on?
• Is the network connection OK?
error.invalid_auth:
🔐 **Authentication Failed**

Invalid username or password. Leave empty if authentication is disabled.
error.timeout_connection:
⏰ **Connection Timeout**

Controller is not responding. Possibly overloaded or unreachable.
error.authentication_error:
🚫 **Authentication Required**

Controller requires credentials. Please enter username and password.
error.api_endpoint_not_found:
🔍 **API Endpoint Not Found**

Controller firmware might be outdated or URL is incorrect.
error.invalid_pool_size:
📏 **Invalid Pool Size**

Value must be between 0.1 and 1000 m³.
error.invalid_configuration:
⚠️ **Configuration Error**

One or more inputs are invalid. Please check.
error.api_response_error:
📡 **Invalid Controller Response**

Controller sending unexpected data. Firmware update needed?
error.firmware_data_missing:
🔄 **Firmware Info Missing**

Could not determine controller firmware version.
error.invalid_firmware_version:
📦 **Firmware Issue**

Controller firmware seems outdated. Please update.
error.connection_error:
🌐 **Network Error**

General connection error. Check network settings.
error.already_configured:
♻️ **Already Configured**

A controller with this IP address is already set up.
error.agreement_declined:
⚠️ **Setup Aborted**

The setup was aborted because the safety disclaimer was not accepted.
error.unknown:
❓ **Unknown Error**

An unexpected problem occurred. Contact support if it persists.

init.title: 🔧 Adjust Pool Settings
init.description:
**What do you want to configure?**

🎛️ Enable/Disable Features
📊 Select Sensors
⚙️ Change Settings

💡 **Tip:** You can return to this menu at any time.

data_description.config_option: Choose what you want to adjust

features.title: 🎛️ Enable/Disable Features
features.description:
**Choose the features you want to use**

✅ Enabled features appear in Home Assistant
❌ Disabled features are hidden

💡 **Tip:** Only enable what you really need - keeps the interface clean!

sensors.title: 📊 Select Sensors
sensors.description:
**Choose which sensors to display**

📈 Only selected sensors will appear in Home Assistant
🔄 Changes are applied immediately

💡 **Tip:** Only select sensors you really want to monitor!

settings.title: ⚙️ General Settings
settings.description:
**Adjust technical parameters**

⏱️ Polling Interval: How often data is fetched
⏰ Timeout: Max wait time for responses
🔄 Retries: Number of retry attempts
🔄 Force Update: Always update entities
📊 Diagnostic Logging: Extended logging

💡 **Tip:** Default values work for most setups!

data_description.retry_attempts: Number of retry attempts on failure (1-10)
data_description.enable_diagnostic_logging: Verbose logs on every update (diagnostics only!)
data_description.force_update: Always update entities even if value unchanged

turn_auto.name: 🤖 Activate AUTO Mode
turn_auto.description:
Switches devices to **intelligent auto mode**.

⚡ The system immediately takes over optimal control based on sensor data and schedules.

entity_id.name: 🎯 Devices to Control
entity_id.description: Select the devices to be switched to AUTO mode.

auto_delay.name: ⏱️ Delay (seconds)
auto_delay.description: Wait time before AUTO mode is activated (0-86400s).

set_pv_surplus.name: 🔋 Use PV Surplus
set_pv_surplus.description:
Activates **Photovoltaic Surplus Mode** for optimal solar power usage.

☀️ Pool devices are automatically powered by excess solar energy.

entity_id.name: 🎯 PV Surplus Switch
entity_id.description: The PV surplus switch of the controller.

manual_dosing.name: 💧 Manual Dosing
manual_dosing.description:
Starts **manual dosing** for the specified duration.

⚠️ **Caution:** Avoid overdosing! Always check water values beforehand.

entity_id.name: 🎯 Dosing System
entity_id.description: Select the dosing system (pH+, pH-, Chlorine, etc.).

duration_seconds.name: ⏰ Dosing Duration (seconds)
duration_seconds.description: How long to dose? (1-3600s, start with short times!)

test_output.name: 🧪 Output Test Mode
test_output.description: Temporarily activates a controller output for diagnostics. Make sure no people or equipment are at risk while the output is forced.

output.name: 🎯 Output ID
output.description: Identifier such as PUMP, HEATER or SOLAR

set_temperature_target.name: 🌡️ Set Target Temperature
set_temperature_target.description:
Sets the **desired pool temperature**.

🏊 The controller automatically heats to this temperature and maintains it.

set_ph_target.name: 🧪 Set pH Target
set_ph_target.description:
Defines the **ideal pH value** for automatic dosing.

⚖️ Recommended range: 7.0-7.4 for optimal water quality and skin compatibility.

entity_ids.name: 🎯 pH Dosing System
entity_ids.description: Select pH control of the controller.

set_chlorine_target.name: 💧 Set Chlorine Target
set_chlorine_target.description:
Determines the **target chlorine level** for safe disinfection.

🦠 Sufficient chlorine eliminates bacteria, too much irritates skin and eyes.

target_value.name: 💧 Chlorine Target (mg/l)
target_value.description: Desired free chlorine level (0.3-1.5 mg/l recommended).

trigger_backwash.name: 🔄 Start Backwash
trigger_backwash.description:
Starts a **filter backwash** for cleaning.

🧽 Removes dirt and debris for optimal filter performance.

start_water_analysis.name: 🔬 Start Water Analysis
start_water_analysis.description:
Starts an **automatic water analysis** of all parameters.

📊 Measures pH, Chlorine, Temperature and other values for optimization suggestions.

set_maintenance_mode.name: 🔧 Maintenance Mode
set_maintenance_mode.description:
Activates/deactivates **Maintenance Mode**.

⚠️ In maintenance mode, all automations are paused for safe work on the pool.

enable.name: 🔧 Enable Maintenance Mode
enable.description: On: Stop all automations | Off: Resume normal operation.

set_all_dmx_scenes_mode.name: 💡 Control DMX Lighting
set_all_dmx_scenes_mode.description:
Controls **all DMX lighting scenes** simultaneously.

🌈 Perfect for uniform lighting effects or complete On/Off.

device_id.name: 🎯 Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller with DMX output.

set_digital_input_rule_lock_state.name: 🔒 Lock Digital Rule
set_digital_input_rule_lock_state.description:
Locks or unlocks **digital switching rules**.

🛡️ Prevents unwanted triggering during maintenance or faults.

device_id.name: 🎯 Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller with digital rules.

rule_key.name: 🔑 Rule Number
rule_key.description: Number of the rule to lock (DIRULE_1 to DIRULE_7).

trigger_digital_input_rule.name: ⚡ Trigger Digital Rule
trigger_digital_input_rule.description:
Manually triggers a **digital switching rule**.

🎯 Useful for testing automations or manual control when needed.

device_id.name: 🎯 Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller with the rules.

rule_key.name: 🔑 Rule Number
rule_key.description: Which rule to trigger? (DIRULE_1 to DIRULE_7)

export_diagnostic_logs.name: 📋 Export Diagnostic Logs
export_diagnostic_logs.description:
Exports **recent integration logs** for troubleshooting and support.

📊 Collects relevant log entries and allows download or file saving.

💡 **Tip:** Useful for issues or when you need to send logs to support!

lines.name: 📝 Number of Lines
lines.description: How many recent log lines to export? (10-1000)

save_to_file.name: 💾 Save to File
save_to_file.description: Save logs as text file in /config/ directory
